title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: PiD Pixel Diffusion by Nvidia is an open-source AI image generation model optimized for high-resolution 4K images. The video demonstrates its capabilities, installation process, and workflows using ComfyUI, comparing it against alternatives like SeedVR2.
